error: The source distribution omitted Cython from its isolated PEP 517 build requirements.
resolution: Installed Cython in cod-env and built the exact 0.4.0 release with --no-build-isolation.

error: The first local-header build omitted the multiarch include root and could not resolve aarch64-linux-gnu/python3.12/pyconfig.h.
resolution: Added both the extracted Python include root and python3.12 include directory; no system package was installed.

error: Official Linux BGMN executables are x86-64 and returned exit 126 / Exec format error on the ARM64 host.
resolution: Preserved the official binaries and invoked them through isolated QEMU user-static 8.2.2 and an extracted x86-64 glibc runtime. Full Dara execution remains designated for native x86-64 if smoke fails.
